metadata.description: Embedded design tools, virtual coworker personas, and Codex/Copilot review workflows

plugins.name: embedded-design-docs
plugins.description: Write HLD, LLD, and unified design documents for embedded software. Includes templates, checklists, and domain-specific prompts for BLE, motor control, OTA, and more.

plugins.name: coworkers
plugins.description: Virtual coworker personas distilled from real colleagues' design docs, code reviews, and decisions. Get a second opinion from your team even when they're not around.

plugins.name: codex-review-council
plugins.description: Add GitHub Copilot CLI with a Claude model as a second local code reviewer when explicitly requested, while preserving the normal Codex development flow.

plugins.name: troubleshooter
plugins.description: Diagnose C134 field issues with structured fault trees and specialist workflows.
